description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Run `mix spec.review` on the specled_ex repo on the current feature branch. Open the HTML in a browser. Verify:
- Triage panel renders with correct finding counts; collapses on a clean PR
- Subject cards render with prose statement headlines
- All four tabs (Spec / Code / Coverage / Decisions) switch and show appropriate content
- Findings show as both top-of-page entries and inline badges
- Misc panel shows unmapped files as flat diff
- HTML is self-contained (test by viewing while offline)

Iterate on visual polish until well-crafted: spacing, typography, color, hierarchy. Add ExUnit tests (with @tag spec: covering specled.spec_review.* requirements) for the data-assembly layer; rendering can be smoke-tested by snapshotting key fragments.
title: End-to-end test + visual polish on specled_ex
